# Project general coding guidelines

## Code Style
- Build UI with React function components and TypeScript.
- Prefer clear, composable components and small focused functions.
- Use modern TypeScript and JavaScript features (`const`, `let`, arrow functions, template literals).
- Keep data visualization code clean and performant.

## Naming Conventions
- Use PascalCase for component names, interfaces, and type aliases.
- Use camelCase for variables, functions, and methods.
- Use ALL_CAPS for constants.

## Code Quality
- Keep UI accessible (labels, aria attributes, semantic HTML).
- Optimize chart rendering performance (avoid unnecessary re-renders).
- Keep state updates immutable and predictable.
- Add brief comments only for complex medical domain logic.
- Ensure data updates are smooth and don't cause visual jitter.
